projectDescription: A ROS 2 robotics demo suite for the Colman UR3e robotic arm, featuring hand-gesture control via MediaPipe, vision-based pick-and-place with YOLO and AprilTag detection, and eye-in-hand camera calibration.
keyFeatures: Hand gesture-controlled robotic arm using MediaPipe hand landmark detection and OAK-D camera
Vision-based pick-and-place with AprilTag pose estimation and vacuum gripper control
Eye-in-hand camera calibration using multiple OpenCV hand-eye solving methods
MoveIt 2 motion planning with OMPL and TracIK kinematics plugin
Pixi-based reproducible ROS 2 Jazzy environment on Linux
Gazebo simulation support with mock hardware mode
YOLO object detection node for real-time segmentation via OAK-D Pro camera
publicApiSurface: ros2 launch arm_demo arm_demo.launch.py gripper_type:=vacuum use_camera:=false
/stop (ROS 2 Trigger service — stops robot trajectory execution)
go_to_pose(ur, arm, logger, x, y, z, qx, qy, qz, qw, params, stop_event)
go_to_joint_pose(ur, arm, logger, joint_values, params, stop_event)
EyeInHandCalibration (ROS 2 node — interactive hand-eye calibration data collector)
DetectionNode (ROS 2 node — YOLO segmentation, publishes to /yolo/annotated)
CameraPublisher (ROS 2 node — DepthAI OAK-D publisher to /oakd_pro/rgb/image)
